settings.title: Behind the Ramp With the Torque Team
settings.excerpt: The diagnostics that look like magic to a customer are usually one stubborn technician and a lot of patience.
settings.body:
Customers sometimes think a fault code tells us exactly what is wrong. It rarely does. It tells us where to start looking.

Last month an intermittent stall had us stumped for two days. Sam ended up driving the car himself, morning and evening, until it finally faltered with the diagnostic gear plugged in. A corroded connector, hidden behind a panel, was the answer.

That is the part of the job nobody sees: the quiet, methodical hunting that turns a vague complaint into a fixed car.

It is also why we would rather you tell us everything, even the detail that seems silly. The smell, the noise, the exact moment it happens. It all narrows the search.
